product.name: lnk
product.tagline: LinkedIn CLI — search jobs, view postings, apply, and manage your LinkedIn from the terminal.

background.problem: LinkedIn has no public API for job seekers. The platform is walled behind a browser UI with no CLI, scriptability, or automation support. Power users, developers, and job seekers who want to search/filter/apply at scale are locked into the slow web/mobile experience.
background.approach: Reverse-engineer LinkedIn's private Voyager GraphQL API from the Android APK (v4.1.1209, decompiled via jadx) and captured mitmproxy traffic. Build a Go CLI that speaks this API directly using session cookies for auth.
data_sources: Decompiled LinkedIn Android APK — 481 GraphQL query IDs with hashes across 261 API resources
Live mitmproxy captures — full request/response format, headers, auth tokens, pagination, RestLi variable encoding
CareersGraphQLClient.java — master query registry from decompiled source
background.key_discovery: LinkedIn uses a custom RestLi encoding for GraphQL variables, NOT standard JSON. Format: (key:value,list:List(a,b)). This was only visible through traffic capture, not the decompiled code alone.

structure.cmd/lnk/main.go: Cobra root command, global flags, subcommand wiring
structure.internal/restli/: RestLi variable encoder (LinkedIn's custom query format)
structure.internal/api/: HTTP client, auth header injection, rate limiting, GraphQL query methods
structure.internal/config/: TOML config loader with precedence (flags > env > config > defaults)
structure.internal/output/: Table/JSON/plain formatters, TTY detection, NO_COLOR support
structure.internal/types/: URN parser, shared response types, exit codes
structure.internal/cmd/: Cobra command implementations (auth, search, job, apply, saved, feed, profile, alerts, status)

job_search.description: Search jobs by keyword, location, filters. Paginated (count/start).

job_detail.description: Full job posting with description, requirements, company info.

easy_apply_check.description: Check if job supports Easy Apply and get form data.

subcommands.login: Import li_at session cookie (interactive prompt with echo disabled)
subcommands.status: Show current auth state and account info

flags.--type, -t: Job type filter (full-time, part-time, contract, temporary, internship, volunteer)
flags.--experience, -e: Experience level (internship, entry, associate, mid-senior, director, executive)
flags.--sort: Sort order: recent or relevant (default: relevant)

search.output: Table: ID | Title | Company | Location | Posted | Apply type

job.output: Title, company, location, description, requirements, salary, applicant count

apply.safety: Interactive confirmation by default. --no-input fails if confirmation needed.

profile.description: View own or another user's profile

status.description: Auth state, connectivity check, config info

exit_codes.3: Auth error (not logged in, expired session)

io_contract.tty_detection: Fancy formatting when interactive, plain when piped

streams.name: Foundation
deliverables: API client (HTTP, auth headers, rate limiting)
Shared types (URN parser, job structs, exit codes)
Cobra root command with global flags
Stub subcommands for all other commands

streams.name: Search + Feed
deliverables: Voyager response parser (nested JSON + URN resolution)

streams.name: Job + Apply + Saved
deliverables: HTML to text converter for job descriptions

merge_plan.step_2: Rebase agent/search-feed onto main, resolve conflicts in internal/cmd/ stubs
merge_plan.step_3: Rebase agent/job-apply onto main, resolve conflicts in internal/cmd/ stubs
merge_plan.step_4: Rebase agent/profile-extras onto main, resolve conflicts in internal/cmd/ stubs
merge_plan.step_5: Final integration: go build, go test, manual smoke test
merge_plan.step_6: Push to main, create GitHub release

testing.integration: Smoke test with real li_at token after merge

risks: LinkedIn may change query hashes in app updates — queries are version-pinned to APK v4.1.1209
Session tokens (li_at) expire — no way to programmatically refresh without re-login
Aggressive rate limiting may block CLI usage patterns
LinkedIn may detect non-browser user-agents and block/ban accounts
RestLi encoding edge cases may cause query failures on untested parameter combinations
Easy Apply submission format may vary per job posting (different form fields)
future: Query hash auto-update from newer APK versions
TUI mode with interactive job browsing
